{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Ninecloud continent
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Ninecloud continent]] contains a jeweled castle sealed in ice at its north.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21">''Dreadgod'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Ninecloud continent]] has many extensions of the [[labyrinth]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22">''Dreadgod'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
